creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
I must explain, that it was me, who added the ability to READ the .gif
files back into the FreeBSD's port. I considered it to be a good
compromise between the GD's author's (Thomas Boutell) desire to kill
GIF (to punish Unisys) and the user's desire to be able to use GD to,
at least, read the .gif images.

Putting back the WRITING of GIFs would not be difficult either (and
allowed by the GD's license), but might alienate the author :)

For such writing (unlike reading) the users would need a Unisys'
permission too.
